# orgSecretsDel

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the orgSecretsDel mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk org-secrets-del --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.ownerId <UUID> --input.secretName <String> --input.namespaceId <UUID>
```

## Examples

csdk org-secrets-del --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.ownerId <UUID> --input.secretName <String> --input.namespaceId <UUID>
